Title: Valid Login with Correct Credentials
Preconditions: User has registered with correct credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "valid_user" in the username field.
2. User enters "valid_password" in the password field.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Invalid Login with Incorrect Credentials
Preconditions: User has registered with correct credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "invalid_user" in the username field.
2. User enters "invalid_password" in the password field.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: Login fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Empty Fields During Login
Preconditions: User has registered with correct credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User leaves both fields empty.
2. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that both fields are required.

Title: Logout Functionality
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the logout button.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Successful Insertion of New User
Preconditions: Database is accessible.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "new_user" in the username field.
2. User enters "new_password" in the password field.
3. User clicks the submit button.
Expected Result: New user is successfully inserted into the database and a success message is displayed.

Title: Failed Insertion Due to Duplicate Username
Preconditions: Database is accessible and contains a duplicate username.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "existing_user" in the username field.
2. User enters "new_password" in the password field.
3. User clicks the submit button.
Expected Result: Insertion fails and an error message is displayed indicating that the username already exists.

Title: Successful Update of Existing User
Preconditions: User is logged in and database is accessible.
Test Data:
- Current Username: existing_user
- New Username: updated_user
- New Password: updated_password
Test Steps:
1. User enters "existing_user" in the current username field.
2. User enters "updated_user" in the new username field.
3. User enters "updated_password" in the new password field.
4. User clicks the update button.
Expected Result: User information is successfully updated in the database and a success message is displayed.

Title: Failed Update Due to Duplicate Username
Preconditions: User is logged in and database is accessible.
Test Data:
- Current Username: existing_user
- New Username: existing_user
- New Password: updated_password
Test Steps:
1. User enters "existing_user" in the current username field.
2. User enters "existing_user" in the new username field.
3. User enters "updated_password" in the new password field.
4. User clicks the update button.
Expected Result: Update fails and an error message is displayed indicating that the username already exists.

Title: Successful Deletion of User
Preconditions: User is logged in and database is accessible.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "user_to_delete" in the username field.
2. User clicks the delete button.
Expected Result: User is successfully deleted from the database and a success message is displayed.

Title: Failed Deletion Due to Non-Existent User
Preconditions: User is logged in and database is accessible.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "non_existent_user" in the username field.
2. User clicks the delete button.
Expected Result: Deletion fails and an error message is displayed indicating that the user does not exist.

Title: Apply and Display Filtered Results
Preconditions: User is logged in and database is accessible.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "search_term" in the filter field.
2. User clicks the apply filter button.
Expected Result: Filtered results are displayed on the screen.

Title: Clear Filtered Results
Preconditions: User is logged in and database is accessible.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "search_term" in the filter field.
2. User clicks the clear filter button.
Expected Result: Filtered results are cleared and original results are displayed.

Title: Insert New Information
Preconditions: User is logged in and database is accessible.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "new_info" in the input field.
2. User clicks the submit button.
Expected Result: New information is successfully inserted into the database and a success message is displayed.

Title: Show Updated Information
Preconditions: User is logged in and database is accessible.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "updated_info" in the input field.
2. User clicks the submit button.
Expected Result: Updated information is successfully shown to another user and a success message is displayed.

Title: Logout After Multiple Logins
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the logout button.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Attempt to Logout Without Being Logged In
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the logout button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user is not logged in.

Title: Logout After Multiple Sessions
Preconditions: User is logged in and multiple sessions are active.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the logout button.
Expected Result: All active sessions are terminated and the user is logged out.

Title: Logout After Session Timeout
Preconditions: User is logged in and session timeout is set.
Test Steps:
1. Wait until session timeout occurs.
2. User tries to access a protected page.
Expected Result: User is automatically logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Logout After Forced Logout
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the force logout button.
Expected Result: User is immediately logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Logout After Session Expired
Preconditions: User is logged in and session expiration is set.
Test Steps:
1. Wait until session expiration occurs.
2. User tries to access a protected page.
Expected Result: User is automatically logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Logout After Session Expired and Force Logout
Preconditions: User is logged in and session expiration is set.
Test Steps:

2. User clicks the force logout button.
Expected Result: User is immediately logged out and redirected to the login page.

2. User tries to access a protected page.

Test Steps:
1. Wait until session expiration occurs.
2. User clicks the force logout button.
3. User tries to access a protected page.
Expected Result: All active sessions are terminated and the user is logged out.
